pairs.question: What is the title of Alice in Chains' fourth studio album?
pairs.answer: The title of Alice in Chains' fourth studio album is 'Black Gives Way to Blue'.

pairs.question: When was the album 'Black Gives Way to Blue' released?
pairs.answer: 'Black Gives Way to Blue' was released on September 25, 2009.

pairs.question: Which singles were featured on the album 'Black Gives Way to Blue'?
pairs.answer: The singles featured on 'Black Gives Way to Blue' were 'A Looking in View', 'Check My Brain', 'Your Decision', and 'Lesson Learned'.

pairs.question: Who replaced Layne Staley as the new vocalist/guitarist on 'Black Gives Way to Blue'?
pairs.answer: William DuVall replaced Layne Staley as the new vocalist/guitarist on 'Black Gives Way to Blue'.

pairs.question: How many copies of 'Black Gives Way to Blue' have been sold worldwide?
pairs.answer: The album 'Black Gives Way to Blue' has sold a million copies around the world.

pairs.question: Which record label released the album 'Black Gives Way to Blue'?
pairs.answer: The album 'Black Gives Way to Blue' was released on Virgin Records.

pairs.question: Which music videos from 'Black Gives Way to Blue' have interactive elements?
pairs.answer: The music video for 'Acid Bubble' is available as an interactive video on AliceinChains.com.
